TWO_FACTOR_AUTHENTICATION_MESSAGE:
Two-factor verification is required for this account.
Please input the 6 digit code provided by your authenticator.
FORGOT_PASSWORD_MESSAGE: Enter the email address that was used to create your account. You will receive an email with further instructions.
FORGOT_PASSWORD_NOTIFICATION_MESSAGE: If a verified account is associated with this email, you will receive instructions on how to reset your password. If you don't find them in your inbox, please check whether you have verified or created the account using this specific email.
RESET_PASSWORD_NOTIFICATION_MESSAGE: Success! You can log in with your new password
ERROR_CODE_INVALID: The invitation link is no longer valid
ACCESS_ERROR: There was a problem signing in to your account. Either email is not valid or the password does not match it. Please try again.
NOT_VERIFIED: If a verified account is associated with this email, you will receive instructions on how to reset your password. If you don't find them in your inbox, please check whether you have verified or created the account using this specific email.
SING_IN_NOT_VERIFIED: Your account is not verified. Please check your email inbox for a verification email. No email? Click
EMAIL_VERIFICATION_SUCCESS: Verification email sent. Please check your inbox.
ACCOUNT_VERIFICATION_SUCCESS_MESSAGE: Congratulations! You may start using your account immediately.
NO_LICENSE_PROMPT: Please upload your licence file to continue.
ERROR_OWNER_ALREADY_REGISTERED: The user with that email already exists.
TWO_FACTOR_AUTHENTICATION_ERROR_ACCESS_E: There was a problem signing in to your account. Please try again.
